mapper.sql: SELECT id, material_code, material_name, spec, unit, category, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted, material_en_name, export_name, brand, item_no, package_spec, storage_condition, transport_condition, length, width, height, logistics_package, box_model, outer_package, require_qc, supplier_brand, supplier_item_no, supplier_spec, erp_sync_remark, remarks FROM sys_material WHERE is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
AND (material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR spec LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR brand LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_material ( material_code, material_name, spec, unit, category, status, create_by, material_en_name, export_name, brand, item_no, package_spec, storage_condition, transport_condition, length, width, height, logistics_package, box_model, outer_package, require_qc, supplier_brand, supplier_item_no, supplier_spec, erp_sync_remark, remarks ) VALUES ( #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{spec}, #{unit}, #{category}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{materialEnName}, #{exportName}, #{brand}, #{itemNo}, #{packageSpec}, #{storageCondition}, #{transportCondition}, #{length}, #{width}, #{height}, #{logisticsPackage}, #{boxModel}, #{outerPackage}, #{requireQc}, #{supplierBrand}, #{supplierItemNo}, #{supplierSpec}, #{erpSyncRemark}, #{remarks} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_material
material_code = #{materialCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, spec = #{spec}, unit = #{unit}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, material_en_name = #{materialEnName}, export_name = #{exportName}, brand = #{brand}, item_no = #{itemNo}, package_spec = #{packageSpec}, storage_condition = #{storageCondition}, transport_condition = #{transportCondition}, length = #{length}, width = #{width}, height = #{height}, logistics_package = #{logisticsPackage}, box_model = #{boxModel}, outer_package = #{outerPackage}, require_qc = #{requireQc}, supplier_brand = #{supplierBrand}, supplier_item_no = #{supplierItemNo}, supplier_spec = #{supplierSpec}, erp_sync_remark = #{erpSyncRemark}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_material SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_material WHERE material_code = #{materialCode} AND is_deleted = 0 AND id != #{excludeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_material SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
